ddls:
CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "pointid" INTEGER /* Reference to the point in space where the data was collected */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the data point */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the data point */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the data point */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the data point */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the data point */,
  "vegetation_density" REAL /* Vegetation density at the data point */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the data point */,
  "aspect" REAL /* Aspect of the data point (compass direction) */,
  "slope" REAL /* Slope of the data point */,
  "land_cover" TEXT /* Land cover type at the data point */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Soil moisture at the data point */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the environmental data (e.g., satellite, weather station, sensor network) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES environmental_data_sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., satellite, weather station, sensor network) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environmental data used for the simulation */,
  "simulation_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was run */,
  "fire_size" REAL /* Size of the fire simulated */,
  "fire_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the fire simulated */,
  "fire_spread_probability" REAL /* Probability of fire spread simulated */,
  "simulation_model" TEXT /* Name of the simulation model used */,
  "simulation_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the prediction model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the prediction model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction model */,
  "model_f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the prediction model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, emergency responder) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access level */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user to the data (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_data" (
  "fire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fire */,
  "pointid" INTEGER /* Reference to the point in space where the fire is located */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the fire */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the fire */,
  "fire_size" REAL /* Size of the fire */,
  "fire_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the fire */,
  "fire_spread_probability" REAL /* Probability of fire spread */,
  "fire_type" TEXT /* Type of fire (e.g., wildfire, prescribed burn) */,
  "fire_status" TEXT /* Status of the fire (e.g., active, contained) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_simulation" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fire simulation */,
  "fire_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fire being simulated */,
  "simulation_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was run */,
  "fire_size" REAL /* Size of the fire simulated */,
  "fire_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the fire simulated */,
  "fire_spread_probability" REAL /* Probability of fire spread simulated */,
  "simulation_model" TEXT /* Name of the simulation model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fire_simulation_fire_id FOREIGN KEY ("fire_id") REFERENCES fire_data ("fire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency response */,
  "fire_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fire being responded to */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of the emergency response */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time of the emergency response */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of emergency response (e.g., fire suppression, evacuation) */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the emergency response (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_responses_fire_id FOREIGN KEY ("fire_id") REFERENCES fire_data ("fire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "responder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emergency responder */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_project" TEXT /* Project being collaborated on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_responder_id FOREIGN KEY ("responder_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
